title: IVR Call Attempt
description: IVR v1 call attempt contract for tracked, evidenced attempts under a call policy.
$comment: Sources: PACK-09 and TECH-09 Call Attempt State Model. Technical failures are not counted as no-answer attempts and must not be treated as customer no-answer.

attempt_number.description: Attempt number within the resolved call policy.

attempt_counted.description: Whether attempt counts toward max attempts. Technical/policy failures should not count.

no_answer.description: Whether attempt is a valid no-answer signal.

invalid_phone.description: Whether phone is invalid based on resolver/provider evidence.

provider_call_id.description: Provider/SIM gateway call id if available.
